title: Type the gate stage/mode cluster (GateStage/GateMode enums)
description:
Eliminate the stringly-typed `GateStage`/`GateMode` handling (report highest-leverage fixes #1 and #2, plus the `gate_execution` nit).

## Sites
- `domain/types.rs` — add `impl FromStr` (typed error) and `Display`/`as_str` for `GateStage` and `GateMode`, mirroring the existing `State`/`Priority`/`ContentFormat` impls.
- `output.rs:1222-1244` — type `GateDefinition.stage`/`.mode` as `GateStage`/`GateMode` instead of `String`; derive `JsonSchema` on `GateMode` (`GateStage` already has it). Deletes the `format!("{:?}", …).to_lowercase()` conversion.
- `commands/gate.rs:608-617` and `main.rs:1886-1906` — parse via `FromStr`.
- `main.rs:2755-2762` and `main.rs:2814-2821` — remove the duplicated enum→string match arms.
- `gate_execution.rs:52-59` — set `JIT_STAGE` via `stage.as_str()`/`Display`, not the inline match (second source of truth vs serde).
- CLI gate stage/mode args use `#[arg(value_enum)]` so clap rejects bad input at parse time.

## Success Criteria
- [ ] `GateStage` and `GateMode` implement `FromStr` (typed `thiserror`) and `Display`/`as_str`; no `format!("{:?}", …).to_lowercase()` remains for either type anywhere.
- [ ] `GateDefinition.stage` and `.mode` are typed `GateStage`/`GateMode`; `GateMode` derives `JsonSchema`.
- [ ] CLI stage/mode arguments use `value_enum`; an invalid value is rejected at parse time, not deeper in the call stack.
- [ ] `gate_execution.rs` sets `JIT_STAGE` through the shared `as_str()`/`Display` with no independent string mapping.
- [ ] `--json` gate output serialization is unchanged (snake_case); `cargo-ci` and `code-review` gates pass.
